title: Retries, Idempotency, Compensation, and Recovery
description: Harden a loop that calls unreliable external services. Learners cumulatively produce a fault-injected recovery harness through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Use bounded retries with backoff and error classification.
Design idempotent operations and deduplication for repeated requests.
Checkpoint durable state so a process can restart without replaying completed effects.
